perks.name: Incarnon Form
perks.desc:
Reach 6x Combo and then Heavy Attack to activate Incarnon Form.
Send forth a spectral axe during aerial and slide attacks.
+100% Melee Damage
+20% Sprint Speed
+20% to Parkour Velocity
perks.notes:
Spectral axes deal 149 damage on contact, then explode dealing 303 Heat damage with a forced Impact status effect in a 5m radius. Axes launched by aerial attacks have 2x damage.
Heat damage on explosions will combine with modded elements. For example, when modded for Electricity, axes will deal Electricity on direct hit and Radiation on explosion.
Spectral axe hits do not add to the melee combo counter.
Direct hits of spectral axes and explosions are affected by faction damage mods, elemental mods, status chance and status damage mods, critical hit mods and Universal damage bonuses.
Direct hits of spectral axes are affected by Condition Overload, while the explosions are not.
Direct hits of spectral axes and explosions are not affected by the stance mod, combo multiplier, damage increase on Evolution II perks or melee damage bonuses like Incarnon form's innate +100% melee damage, Pressure Point, and Arcane Fury.
Lateral slam attack is replaced by the axe throw, reducing mobility. Slam attacks can only be performed directly downwards while Incarnon is active.

perks.name: Incarnon Form
perks.desc:
Direct shots charge Incarnon Transmutation; Alt Fire transmutes. Switching back will expend any remaining charge.
Fire a long-range Toxin beam.
perks.notes:
Incarnon Form becomes a continuous beam weapon with a 37 meter range, and a 2.3 meter damage radius from the point of impact against a surface. The beam is then capable of chaining to up to 5 nearby enemies within 7 meters of each other, with each chain doing 75% of the previous chain's damage. The base damage, Critical Chance, Critical Multiplier, and Status Chance are also increased. However, the Zoom is reduced.
Punch Through mods have no effect on the behavior of the beam.
The 2.3 meter damage radius from the point of impact CAN be benefit from Firestorm (Primed).
Mods such as Sinister Reach or Combustion Beam are not available for use, as the base Torid is not a beam weapon.
As a continuous weapon, the spherical damage radius does not benefit from Multishot; only targets directly hit by the beam benefit.
The beam will chain independently to 5 additional enemies starting from each target hit by the initial damage radius. Each chain chooses targets independently, and an enemy can be struck by multiple chains. However, due to the damage radius not benefiting from multishot, beams chaining from targets that were in the damage radius but not directly struck by the initial beam itself will also not benefit from multishot.
The damage radius is not a separate damage instance from the beam, so a target that is directly struck by the beam is still only hit once.
